hero.title: Modernize Patient Communication and Clinic Management
hero.subtitle: Centralize calls, appointments, doctors, patients and social interactions inside one intelligent, enterprise-grade platform.

features.title: Everything you need to run your clinic smoothly
features.subtitle: A comprehensive suite of tools designed specifically for modern healthcare communication.
features.routingDesc: Manage, route and monitor all patient calls seamlessly without losing track.
features.analyticsDesc: Track clinic performance with powerful statistics, response times, and staff reports.

features.socialDesc: Handle WhatsApp, Messenger, and Instagram interactions in a single unified inbox.
features.centralizedDesc: Bring all medical communication and patient data together in a secure compliance portal.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Call360 Clinica?
whyChooseUs.subtitle: We empower medical teams to focus on what matters most: patient care. By automating repetitive tasks and organizing communication, Call360 Clinica acts as the backbone of your digital transformation.
whyChooseUs.efficiencyDesc: Reduce administrative work, prevent receptionist burnout, and improve productivity.
whyChooseUs.experienceDesc: Deliver faster, more professional communication to build lasting patient loyalty.
whyChooseUs.insightsDesc: Monitor calls, appointments, and staff performance instantly with smart dashboards.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Call360 Clinica and how it can transform your healthcare organization's communication.
faq.a1: Yes, our platform includes a robust medical scheduling system that allows you to easily book, reschedule, and manage patient appointments across multiple calendars and doctors.
faq.q2: Does the platform support multiple doctors?
faq.a2: Absolutely. You can manage schedules, patient assignments, and specific communication channels for any number of doctors within your clinic or hospital.
faq.a3: Yes, our advanced analytics dashboard provides real-time insights into call resolution times, appointment conversion rates, and overall team efficiency.
faq.q4: Can social media interactions be tracked?
faq.a4: Yes, Call360 Clinica centralizes messages and inquiries from various social media platforms into a single unified inbox, ensuring no patient query is missed.
faq.q5: Is the platform suitable for dental clinics?
faq.a5: Yes, the platform is highly adaptable and is currently used by dental centers, hospitals, psychologists, physiotherapists, and pharmacies.
faq.readyHelp: Our team is ready to help you find the right solution.

cta.title: Transform the Way You Manage Patient Relationships

points.label: Patient Booking
points.old: Manual logs, phone busy tones, double-booking errors.
points.new: 24/7 online booking, automated confirmations, calendar syncing.

points.label: Call Handling
points.old: Receptionist overwhelmed, no tracking of missed callbacks.
points.new: Smart routing, queue monitoring, instant call logs and data.

points.label: Social Channels
points.old: Staff switching between WhatsApp, Instagram and phone.
points.new: All channels centralized in one single professional inbox.

points.label: Patient History
points.old: Searching through paper files or separate old systems.
points.new: Unified card with medical logs, past calls, and SMS history.
